pr.title: fix(movers): UNKNOWN catalyst fallback, remove collapsed posture
pr.body: ## Summary Fixes two confirmed Movers defects on `main`: 1. **12/12 SECTOR bug** — `classifyCatalystTypeFromHeadline` used `SECTOR` as the catch-all for any non-empty headline with no keyword hit. Unclassified headlines now return **`UNKNOWN`**; **`SECTOR`** is assigned only on a positive match against the SECTOR keyword group. 2. **Collapsed posture** — Removes the posture badge and **Posture** column from the collapsed row. Posture remains in the expanded detail card (lazy read). ## Classifier (`lib/movers-types`) - Added **`UNKNOWN`** to `MoversCatalystType`. - Keyword matching uses **token/phrase boundaries** (whitespace tokens; hyphenated compounds like `defense-sector` no longer match bare `sector`). - MA → EARNINGS → CONTRACT → GOV → ANALYST → **SECTOR** order unchanged; empty headline still **`NONE`**. ## UI (`MoversFeed.tsx`) - **`UNKNOWN`** displays as **NO CATALYST** (same as `NONE` in the tag; distinct in data for telemetry). - Collapsed grid/header: **Ticker / Price / % Change / Catalyst** (four data columns + chevron). ## Telemetry - Each poll logs `catalystTypeCounts` for all types including **`UNKNOWN`** and **`NONE`** separately (`Movers catalyst type counts`). ## Verification - `pnpm run typecheck` — api-server and alpha-terminal - `vitest` — `catalystKeywords.test.ts` (UNKNOWN vs SECTOR, defense-sector, CONTRACT before SECTOR) ## Diagnose note `api-server` build already runs `tsc --noEmit` via `pnpm run typecheck` before `build.mjs`; no pipeline change required.
pr.author: achase1982-afk
